author: SantiMod
content:
Moon Landing Surprise for Most Engaged Community Members 

 As the ReBirth of a Metaverse comes to an end, we are showing our appreciation and gratitude by rewarding those Star Atlas community members who have been helping everyone from the very beginning   

 That is why we are giving a surprise Armstrong Forever meta-poster to community members @[AEP] Funcracker @Eoganacht | BULK  and @[AEP] Prometheus ⪛⦿⫺  for being the Top 3 most active users across all channels and for constantly helping other fellow Star Atlas community members!

 Sale of the Armstrong meta-poster featuring this special version of the Opal Jet space racer, which the three will also receive, closes in just a few hours! → https://play.staratlas.com/rebirth/3J73XDv9QUsXJdWKD8J6YFk4XxPNx5hijqjyxdNJqaG9

Mentions: @[AEP] Funcracker, @Eoganacht | BULK, @[AEP] Prometheus ⪛⦿⫺
